creator: ggg_mail@inbox.ru
text:
I now have built vbox-ose-kmod-4.0.12 on my host (I use FBSD x86 8.1 and  
that's the latest version available from ports) with gnu binutils  
installed.

Loading vboxdrv.ko is OK.

Loading vboxnetadp fails with the same message:

# kldload /boot/modules/vboxnetadp.ko
kldload: can't load /boot/modules/vboxnetadp.ko: No such file or directory

In DMESG I got:
link_elf: symbol RTR0Init undefined

The same thing happens with vboxnetflt but the message in DMESG is:

link_elf: symbol ng_unref_node undefined

So, the problem is still here.
